skill_text:
API-Bank-style local fixture tool for saving a note to an offline memory store. Provide all required fields: `workspace`, `title`, and `content`.
When to use:
- Use `notes_create_memory` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- Provide all required fields: `workspace`, `title`, and `content`.
- Optional control is available through `tags` when the request needs extra specificity.
- Use examples to map paraphrases into schema-faithful arguments.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
Argument template:
{"content": "sample_content_4", "tags": ["sample_tags_item_4"], "title": "Sample Title", "workspace": "sample_workspace_4"}
Examples:
Minimal valid request that satisfies the required fields for notes_create_memory
{"content": "sample_content_1", "title": "Sample Title", "workspace": "sample_workspace_1"}
Richer invocation that uses optional controls for notes_create_memory
{"content": "sample_content_2", "tags": ["sample_tags_item_2"], "title": "Sample Title", "workspace": "sample_workspace_2"}
Required-argument dev behavior example.
{"content": "sample_content_3", "title": "Sample Title", "workspace": "sample_workspace_3"}
Optional, enum, nested, or array argument example.
{"content": "sample_content_4", "tags": ["sample_tags_item_4"], "title": "Sample Title", "workspace": "sample_workspace_4"}
